name: dotai
description: Cross-tool AI coding agent config registry. Reusable skills, sub-agents, hooks, and slash commands that drop into any project — installable via Claude Code's native marketplace, OpenAI Codex, or the dotai curl|sh installer.

plugins.name: dotai-base
plugins.description: Reusable skills (code-review, commit-message, changelog) plus the implementer sub-agent. Generic, project-agnostic, no shell side effects.
